<!--
Thanks for submitting a pull request!

Before submitting, please check:

1. Your .glsl file is placed DIRECTLY in the transitions/ folder (not in a subdirectory).
   Correct:   transitions/MyTransition.glsl
   Wrong:     transitions/MyTransition.glsl/MyTransition.glsl

   If you used the GitHub web UI, type "transitions/MyTransition.glsl" in the filename field.

2. Your file includes Author and License comments at the top.

3. Your transition is not a duplicate of an existing one.

See CONTRIBUTING.md for full guidelines.
-->
